ccf_reference_note: 基于现行 CCF 推荐目录思路维护，仅保留当前三个关注领域最相关的 A 类会刊提示，供 Codex scholar worker 使用。

topics.label: 零知识证明 + 形式化验证
published_search_hints: DBLP search: zero-knowledge proof formal verification
recent papers on proof systems and verification
preprint_search_hints: DBLP or arXiv search: zk-SNARK CoRR
DBLP or arXiv search: zero-knowledge proof formal verification preprint
ccf_a_venues: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
Proceedings of the ACM on Programming Languages
topics.why_track: 重点追踪零知识证明系统与形式化验证方法在协议设计、证明系统与验证工具链上的交叉进展。

topics.label: PCB Placement
published_search_hints: DBLP search: printed circuit board placement
recent DAC or TCAD PCB placement papers
preprint_search_hints: DBLP or arXiv search: PCB placement CoRR
DBLP or arXiv search: printed circuit board placement preprint
ccf_a_venues: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems
topics.why_track: 重点盯高密度板级布局、可布线性、异形器件约束与学习驱动 placement 方法。

topics.label: 形式化验证 + 智能合约
published_search_hints: DBLP search: smart contract formal verification
recent security and PL venue papers on smart contract verification
preprint_search_hints: DBLP or arXiv search: smart contract formal verification CoRR
DBLP or arXiv search: Solidity verification preprint
ccf_a_venues: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
Proceedings of the ACM on Programming Languages
topics.why_track: 重点关注智能合约安全、属性生成、程序逻辑、模型检测与形式方法在链上程序上的落地。
